$comment: Code<->Figma contract for RADIUS. Reconciled to the PEA-126 'Path C' 12-rung scale in the dev-conner merge (was the old calc()-multiplier ladder; the Figma 'radius' collection was migrated value-preservingly to match — see docs/design-system/radius-handoff.md). Source of truth is the design-system @theme block (dist/tokens.css → --radius-{name}: var(--radius-{px}), which Tailwind v4 turns into rounded-{name} utilities). Figma's 'radius' collection mirrors it 1:1: value-named primitives (radius-0..radius-9999) aliased by extended-t-shirt semantics. check_radius_drift.mjs asserts each Figma rung's px equals the code @theme value (rem->px @16). Unlike the old ladder, ALL 12 rungs (including radius-none and radius-round) are @theme entries resolving through a primitive — no stock-Tailwind exceptions. CI can't reach Figma live, so this snapshot is the committed bridge — refresh it (use_figma) together with any intentional ladder change. See CONVENTIONS.md §8.
